name: Signal Safari
thesis: Turn internet chatter into live product concepts, score them, and tee them up for tokenized launches.
previewHighlights: Market pulse cards for each discovery

roadmap.title: Tighten onboarding loop
roadmap.detail: Reduce first insight latency below 25 seconds.

roadmap.title: Ship social clip composer
roadmap.detail: Convert trend findings into launch threads and short clips.

roadmap.title: Release win-rate report
roadmap.detail: Surface which trend archetypes convert into higher Bags demand.

activeRun.objective: Refactor the insight queue and ship the clip composer modal.
activeRun.promptSnapshot: Prioritize the feature that best increases repeat usage while keeping the launch narrative simple.
